title: Boudin and Blanc Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious bowl dish featuring boudin and a side of creamy blanc sauce.
instructions: Cook the blanc according to the package instructions.
Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add the boudin and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for an additional minute.
Add the cherry tomatoes to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to release their juices.
To assemble the bowl, place a scoop of cooked blanc on the bottom, followed by a slice of cooked boudin.
Top the boudin with a spoonful of mixed greens and a sprinkle of salt and pepper.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the top of the bowl and serve immediately.
